name: "[Feature]: <Your feature title / 你的功能名称>"
about: 简短描述功能 / Describe this issue template's purpose here.
title: "[Feature]"
labels: features
assignees: ''

---

---
name: "🚀 Feature request / 功能需求"
about: Suggest an idea for this project / 为本项目提议一个新功能
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: features
assignees: ''

---

## 🚀 功能描述 (Feature Description)
<!-- (English) A clear and concise description of what the feature is. -->
<!-- (中文) 请清晰简洁地描述该功能的具体内容。 -->

## 💡 需求背景 (Motivation / Use Case)
<!-- (English) Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve? -->
<!-- (中文) 为什么需要这个功能？它解决了什么痛点或使用场景？ -->

## 🛠️ 建议的实现方案 (Proposed Solution)
<!-- (English) A description of how you want this feature to be implemented. -->
<!-- (中文) 描述你希望如何实现这个功能，如果有初步思路请写在这里。 -->

## 🎨 界面或交互原型 (Mockups / Visuals)
<!-- (English) Add any screenshots, drawings, or mockups to help explain your idea. -->
<!-- (中文) 如果涉及 UI 或交互变动，请在此上传截图、草图或说明。 -->

## 📋 补充上下文 (Additional Context)
<!-- (English) Any other context or screenshots about the feature request here. -->
<!-- (中文) 其他任何关于此需求的背景信息或参考资料。 -->

---

- [ ] I have searched existing issues to ensure this is not a duplicate. / 我已搜索过现有 Issue，确保这不是重复需求。
- [ ] I am willing to help implement this feature (optional). / 我愿意参与实现此功能（可选）。
